task_description: Build a new advanced multi-currency adaptive trading system that detects market regimes, switches strategies dynamically, manages a multi-symbol portfolio with correlation awareness, uses adaptive position sizing with online learning, and includes a full backtester and MT5 live trader.

verification.summary: All Python files compile. run_demo.py executes in 2.78s: positive returns, 6 regimes detected, 3 strategies used, 72 trades across 3 symbols. Semantic review v3 verdict: APPROVED. Two critical adaptation issues (slow EMA-based learning, regime truncation in MT5) were fixed in review iterations.
